query:
SELECT variantCode, variantName, sellingPriceFOB 
FROM product_variants 
WHERE variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%'
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute 
SELECT variantCode, variantName, sellingPriceFOB 
FROM product_variants 
WHERE variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%'
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 20;
